Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Broken Crown]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan and Yerin's souls are being measured for the Broken Crown construct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — The Broken Crown is a Divine Treasure implanted in the souls of the Uncrowned warriors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — The Broken Crown's constructs are colored based on the madra of the representative’s Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Ziel's signature is a Broken Crown the red of blood madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — The white crown is a Broken Crown construct.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — The Broken Crown is a unique treasure earned by the top eight of each tournament.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Ziel's Broken Crown is a black halo split in the middle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — The Uncrowned Queen's Broken Crown hovers over her head.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Ziel's Broken Crown could theoretically be used to create a link.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
